projects.title: E-Commerce Platform
projects.description: A full-featured online store with cart, payment integration, and admin dashboard
projects.longDescription: Built a complete e-commerce solution with user authentication, product management, shopping cart, and Stripe payment integration. Features include real-time inventory tracking and order management.

projects.title: Task Management App
projects.description: Collaborative task management with real-time updates and team features
projects.longDescription: A productivity app with drag-and-drop task boards, real-time collaboration using WebSockets, team management, and deadline tracking.

projects.title: Portfolio Website
projects.description: Modern portfolio website with smooth animations and responsive design
projects.longDescription: A clean, professional portfolio showcasing projects with dynamic content loading, contact form integration, and optimized performance.

projects.title: Weather Dashboard
projects.description: Real-time weather app with forecasts and location search
projects.longDescription: Weather application using OpenWeather API with 7-day forecasts, location search, and weather alerts.

projects.title: Blog CMS
projects.description: Content management system for blogs with markdown support
projects.longDescription: A lightweight CMS with markdown editor, image uploads, SEO optimization, and user roles.

projects.title: Chat Application
projects.description: Real-time messaging app with rooms and file sharing
projects.longDescription: Real-time chat with private rooms, file sharing, emoji support, and message history.
